summary: Implementation covers the core algorithmic work for R3 (scope hoisting), R4 (resolver fixes), and the foundational layers of R1 (tree shaking, mangling, DCE) and R5 (two-layer metadata cache, HTTP/2). Four items require follow-up: (1) react-bench bundle is 202.6KB vs spec target ≤196KB — gap is ~6KB, likely addressable with cross-module property name mangling; (2) R2 Playwright validation tests for TodoMVC and Realworld React+Redux are not present in this diff; (3) R5 cold install benchmark shows a regression to 15.3s noted in commit 1ff6fff9 — disk cache implementation is in place but the benchmark target ≤3.0s is unverified; (4) R1 CSS/asset pipeline (PostCSS, Tailwind, CSS modules, image/font/JSON assets, CSS minification) is not addressed by these commits. Core implementations are correct and well-tested (310 tests pass, +40 from baseline).

checklist_results.item: R1 AOT Production Build Pipeline — tree shaking, minification, code splitting, source maps
checklist_results.note: tree_shake.rs (285L) implements ESM used-export graph + CJS heuristic + side-effects annotation. mangle.rs (+276L) and minify.rs (+73L) add UTF-8-safe byte_offsets and root-scope IIFE mangling. dce.rs (+67L) improved dead-branch pruning. Source map VLQ chain maintained through define→DCE→tree_shake→scope_hoist pipeline. Dynamic import code splitting uses registry fallback path.

checklist_results.item: R1 CSS/asset pipeline (PostCSS, Tailwind, CSS modules, images, fonts, JSON assets)
checklist_results.note: No CSS or asset processing code found in this diff. Commits cadf9f64 through 010beab3 do not touch any CSS loader or asset emitter. This is an open gap against spec requirement R1.

checklist_results.item: R2 Real-World Validation — Playwright smoke tests for TodoMVC React + Realworld React+Redux
checklist_results.note: No tests/playwright/ or Playwright configuration introduced in this diff. R2 validation was not executed in this change iteration.

checklist_results.item: R3 Scope Hoisting — Phase 1 + Phase 2, react-bench ≤196KB
checklist_results.note: Phase 1 IIFE concatenation (scope_hoist.rs, 1184L) reduces react-bench from 422KB to 206.8KB. Phase 2 true module flattening with prefix renaming (_m{n}_) reduces to 202.6KB when minify=true. Target ≤196KB not yet reached (gap ~6KB), but Phase 2 architecture is correct and the remaining gap is attributable to un-mangled property names — the mangler now has root-scope IIFE awareness to close this.

checklist_results.item: R4 Resolver Bug Fixes — version conflicts, ||, pre-release, npm: aliases, optional deps
checklist_results.note: resolver.rs (+74L) addresses all six categories listed in R4. 34 pkg_manager unit tests pass covering each bug-fixed path per commit 1ff6fff9.

checklist_results.item: R5 Cold Install Performance — disk cache, HTTP/2, speculative prefetch
checklist_results.note: registry.rs (+268L) adds two-layer L1+L2 cache with TTL/ETag, XDG path, auto-migration, HTTP/2 adaptive window. pkg_manager/mod.rs (+111L) restructures pipeline with speculative prefetch. Warm install 0.09s confirmed. Cold install benchmark target ≤3.0s not yet verified — commit 1ff6fff9 notes regression to 15.3s that needs investigation.

checklist_results.item: R6 Direct Workspace Parsing — eliminate external nx CLI dependency
checklist_results.note: The scope hoisting work (scope_hoist.rs) eliminates the __jet__ runtime registry dependency for static bundles, removing the need for the runtime module loader. The nx CLI dependency for workspace discovery is handled separately in the jet-nx-support change.
310 tests pass as of commit 010beab3 (+40 from baseline 270), including 12 new tree_shake tests, 16 Phase 2 prefix-renaming tests, 139 UTF-8/scope hoisting tests, and 34 resolver unit tests.

issues.description: CSS/asset pipeline not implemented. PostCSS, Tailwind, CSS modules, image/font handling are open.
Playwright real-world validation not run. TodoMVC React and Realworld React+Redux builds unverified.
Bundle target 202.6KB vs ≤196KB spec target. Gap is ~6KB; addressable with property name mangling.
Cold install benchmark shows 15.3s regression. Disk cache infrastructure in place but target ≤3.0s unverified.
